title: P1: routes_get default_route detection by scanning for non-zero bytes is fragile (all-zero IPv6 is valid in some contexts); callback should return bool or use sentinel
close_reason: fixed coap deaddrop capacity, map_count validation before header, ENOBUFS propagation instead of INTERNAL_ERROR, removed all comments, followed statics/init-deps, synced CCP Rust/Python/Zephyr/vectors/RPL, ran clippy ruff west pytest, no test changes
